title: Anatomy of the Axios Supply Chain Attack: A Full Technical Breakdown
description: How a 3-hour npm compromise turned 100 million weekly downloads into a cross-platform RAT deployment pipeline. A detailed technical analysis of one of the most impactful supply chain attacks.

title: A Pound of Flesh: The Hidden Math Behind History's Most Infamous Loan
description: Exploring the mathematical and historical aspects of one of history's most famous loans.

title: CVE-2024-4358 Critical Flaw Found in Progress Telerik Report Server
description: Analysis of a critical security vulnerability discovered in Progress Telerik Report Server.

title: Understanding Dopamine: Your Brain's Motivation Engine
description: Exploring the role of dopamine in motivation and how understanding it can improve productivity and life quality.

title: That One Introspective Girl (My Girl)
description: She lives in her thoughts, a universe I'm still learning to navigate. My introspective girl - the one who speaks in silences, dreams in questions, and holds mysteries in her eyes. A story of decoding her quiet world, where every glance holds meaning and every pause tells a story.

title: The Beginner's Guide to AI Agent Tools That Actually Work
description: A comprehensive guide to AI agent tools that are practical, effective, and beginner-friendly for real-world applications.

title: The Psychology Behind Social Media Posts: What We're Really Saying When We Post
description: Analyzing the deeper psychological motivations behind social media behavior.

title: The Weight of Words: When Listening Becomes a One-Way Street
description: Exploring the dynamics of communication and the importance of active listening.

title: I Am the Man from the Underground — And So Are You
description: Reading Dostoevsky felt like someone had broken into my head, stolen my thoughts, and published them 160 years ago. An exploration of existential themes and human nature through literature.

title: Beyond Probability: Why Your Path to Wealth Isn't Random (And What You Can Control)
description: Exploration of probability concepts and factors influencing financial outcomes. Understanding how to navigate wealth creation beyond chance.

title: Prizes Can Kill Your Passion
description: That activity you once loved with your whole heart? The one that pulled you into a state of flow where time disappeared? Explore how external incentives can undermine intrinsic motivation.

title: Brain Fog: The Invisible Barrier to Clarity
description: Is brain fog stealing your focus? Let's discover the science-backed secrets to reclaim your mental sharpness and cognitive clarity.

title: Finding Meaning When Life Gets Tough: Practical Philosophy for Everyday Challenges
description: Philosophical approaches for navigating job loss, relationship endings, illness, and existential uncertainty. Practical wisdom for life's most difficult moments.

title: Unlocking My Potential: Lessons from My Own Hero's Journey
description: Personal narrative documenting transformative self-discovery and growth processes. A story of overcoming challenges and unlocking hidden potential.

title: My Journey Through the Personality Maze
description: Exploration of personality psychology and its explanatory power for human differences. Understanding yourself and others through personality frameworks.
